action: Define the authority relationship among canonical state, append-only team claims, derived projections, and external behavioral proof.
selection_basis: M-001 is completed and its handoff calls for linked contradiction modeling. CM-006 established fail-closed item reconciliation; the next prerequisite is an explicit authority model for whole-queue projection.

claim_state_summary.observed: Canonical coordination files predate newer append-only team records.
claim_state_summary.inferred: The repository uses layered authority resembling snapshot plus event records.
claim_state_summary.proposed: Whole-queue projections should expose authority stratum and source record for every projected field.
claim_state_summary.superseded: Newest timestamp alone establishes canonical authority.
claim_state_summary.unresolved: The authorized promotion mechanism from additive records to canonical state remains unspecified.

contradiction_resolved: Newer additive progress and older canonical state are authority-layer divergence unless an authorized promotion rule proves otherwise.
privacy_boundary: Only public repository metadata and abstract operational semantics were persisted.
verification: Both committed artifacts are valid JSON by construction through the GitHub UTF-8 contents API; behavioral automation of the authority model is not yet implemented.
limits: No canonical queue promotion was performed.
No private chat or file-library content was persisted.
The authority model is documented but not yet enforced by a whole-queue projector.
next_action: Implement a read-only whole-queue projector that preserves canonical fields, attaches newer claims as accepted, superseded, rejected, or unresolved, and emits authority_stratum plus provenance for every projected field.
